data.name: I got GOONED by a FEMBOY
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy

Late night and you can't sleep.

You decide to browse a popular Dating App to see what's out there. If nothing else, it'll help get you sleepy. And who knows, maybe you'll find some inspiration for some alternative remedy.

Ready, Set, GOON!

Read through an exciting story as well as some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay
  • Kinetic Visual Novel
  • H-Scenes
  • ~4K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
